title: OpenAI to nearly double workforce to 8,000 by end-2026
description: OpenAI plans to nearly double its workforce to 8,000 from 4,500 by the end of 2026, FT reports.

title: OpenAI to acquire Astral (uv, ruff, ty)
description: Astral team will join Codex team at OpenAI. Open source tools will continue to be supported.

title: Tech Workers 'Tokenmaxxing' AI Agent Use
description: An engineer at OpenAI processed 210 billion tokens through AI models over the last week.

title: Publisher pulls horror novel 'Shy Girl' over AI concerns
description: Hachette Book Group will not publish 'Shy Girl' over concerns that AI was used to generate the text.

title: Why Wall Street wasn't won over by Nvidia's big conference
description: Despite investor fears of an AI bubble, Nvidia's latest conference shows most in the industry aren't concerned.

title: Amazon reportedly building a new AI-powered smartphone
description: If Amazon follows through, experts warn it would be next to impossible to break into a crowded market.

title: DoJ has taken down botnets behind the largest-ever DDoS attack
description: They had infected more than 3 million devices.

title: 中国AI资产将全面爆发
description: 36kr article on China's AI asset growth outlook for 2026.

title: 华为发布2026年八大'行业+AI'旗舰解决方案
description: 华为中国合作伙伴大会2026发布八大行业+AI解决方案。

title: 小米发布新一代SU7，加速布局AI大模型，计划投入600亿
description: 小米正加速转型为由AI深度赋能的人车家全生态企业，计划在大模型等领域投入至少600亿元。

title: 华东师大'AI一作'社会实验成果发布
description: 全球首个以AI为第一作者的哲学社会科学论文征文活动，收到9国724篇投稿。

title: 沐曦北京AI研究院启用暨企业开源中心揭牌
description: 沐曦股份开源MXMACA自研软件栈，已积累超30万开发者用户。

title: Trump releases national AI framework targeting state laws
description: White House unveiled AI policy urging Congress to pre-empt state rules, protect children, and shield communities from high energy costs.

title: AI helps unlock geothermal potential - Zanskar
description: Geothermal company Zanskar claims its AI models have made more discoveries in three years than the industry found in 30.
